name: Setup ACME Cloudflare
description: Install acme.sh and issue a Let's Encrypt wildcard certificate via Cloudflare DNS-01

parameters.name: Cloudflare API Token
parameters.description: Cloudflare API Token with Zone:DNS:Edit permission

parameters.name: Cloudflare Zone ID
parameters.description: Cloudflare Zone ID for the domain

parameters.name: ACME Domain
parameters.description: Domain for wildcard cert (e.g. ohnewarum.de). Defaults to domain_suffix without leading dot.

commands.description: Install acme.sh, issue wildcard cert, deploy to /etc/ssl/addon/
